text.title: knowledge-areas-overview Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for knowledge-areas-overview as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Skipping knowledge areas because "this is a small project".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Small projects skip Planning (no stakeholder map) and Evaluation (no feedback loop); both failures produce avoidable rework in subsequent iterations.

failure-mode.description: Using BABOK as a rigid process instead of a competency and knowledge framework.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: BABOK is descriptive, not prescriptive. Applying it linearly on agile projects produces waterfall artifacts even when the team is running sprints.
